name: Espresso (Single)

name: Espresso (Double)
description: Two shots of espresso.

name: Flat White
description: Double shot of espresso with microfoam.

name: Cold Brew
description: Steeped in cold water for 12+ hours; high caffeine.

name: Iced Coffee
description: Brewed hot coffee served over ice.

description: Espresso, chocolate, and steamed milk.

name: Espresso Macchiato

name: Cortado

name: Drip/Brewed Coffee
description: Classic filter coffee.

description: Smooth, light-bodied coffee brewed by dripping hot water over grounds.

name: Nitro Cold Brew
description: Cold brew infused with nitrogen gas for a creamy, stout-like effect.

name: Coffee Frappuccino
description: Ice-blended sweet coffee drink topped with whipped cream.

description: Unfiltered coffee prepared by finely grinding beans and simmering.

description: Strong dark roast coffee mixed with sweetened condensed milk over ice.

name: Affogato
description: A scoop of vanilla gelato drowned in a shot of hot espresso.

name: Irish Coffee
description: Hot coffee, Irish whiskey, and sugar, topped with cream.

name: Monster Energy
description: Iconic 'Green' Monster with a heavy caffeine punch.

name: Reign
description: High-performance fuel with BCAAs and 300mg caffeine.

description: The classic energy drink that gives you wings.

description: Zero calorie, high caffeine energy drink with creatine and BCAAs.

name: Lipton Iced Tea
description: Commercial bottled sweet iced tea.

description: The classic, crisp cola beverage.

description: Zero-calorie cola with a slightly higher caffeine content than classic.

description: Sweet, refreshing cola with a hint of citrus.
